landing_hero_tagline: The AI marketing agency you can brief in 5 minutes
landing_hero_description: Brief your product once. Get professional content strategies, original visuals, and platform-optimized copy — generated and published automatically.
landing_features_title: Everything you need to market like a pro
landing_features_subtitle: Six powerful AI tools working together to keep your brand visible, consistent, and growing — without the agency price tag.
landing_features_ai_strategy_description: Get a full 2-week content plan generated from your brief. The AI maps out topics, formats, and timing tailored to your audience and goals.
landing_features_ai_visuals_description: Brand-informed image generation, not templates. The AI studies your visual identity and creates original graphics that feel authentically yours.
landing_features_optimized_copy_descript: Scroll-stopping hooks, value-driven body copy, and goal-aligned CTAs — crafted for each platform's best practices and character limits.
landing_features_publishing_description: Schedule and auto-publish to LinkedIn with a single click. Your content goes live on time, every time — no manual posting needed.
landing_features_brand_understanding_des: Your brief teaches the AI your voice, audience, and goals. The more you share, the more on-brand every piece of content becomes.
landing_features_review_description: AI proposes, you dispose. Review every post, swap visuals, tweak copy, or regenerate — you always have the final say.
landing_how_subtitle: From brief to published content in three simple steps.
landing_how_step1_description: Tell us about your product, brand, and audience. Paste your website URL and we'll auto-extract the rest. Takes about 5 minutes.
landing_how_step2_description: Our AI creates a complete 2-week content plan with original visuals and platform-optimized copy — tailored to your brand and goals.
landing_how_step3_description: Preview every post, make edits if you want, then approve and schedule. BriefAgent handles the rest — publishing on time, every time.
landing_pricing_subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you're ready. No credit card required.
landing_cta_title: Ready to stop struggling with marketing?
landing_cta_description: Join the beta and let AI handle your content strategy, visuals, and publishing — while you focus on building your product.
footer_tagline: The AI marketing agency you can brief in 5 minutes.
landing_meta_title: BriefAgent — The AI Marketing Agency You Can Brief in 5 Minutes
landing_meta_description: Brief your product once. Get professional content strategies, original visuals, and platform-optimized copy — generated and published automatically.
